tasks.title: Implement OAuth2 authentication with GitHub
tasks.description:
Add OAuth2 authentication with GitHub provider. Create session management middleware and protect API routes.

Scope: src/auth/, src/middleware/auth.ts
Test: Add integration tests for the full login → session → logout flow.

tasks.title: Add API rate limiting with Redis backend
tasks.description:
Implement token bucket rate limiting on all API routes. Use the Redis client at @lib/redis.ts.

Constraints: 100 req/min for authenticated users, 20 req/min for anonymous.
Test: Verify rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-*) and 429 responses.

tasks.title: Fix date range filter across month boundaries
tasks.description:
Date range filter returns incorrect results when crossing month boundaries. Users report missing data from the last day of previous month.

Root cause: `getMonthRange()` in @lib/date-utils.ts uses exclusive end dates but the query uses `<=`.
Fix: Change query to use `<` with next-day boundary, OR change getMonthRange to inclusive.
Test: Existing test in date-utils.test.ts covers happy path but not month crossings.

tasks.title: Quarterly dependency update
tasks.description: Update React 19, TypeScript 5.5, Next.js 15. Review breaking changes and fix any type errors.

tasks.title: Add CSV export for dashboard data
tasks.description:
Users should be able to export filtered dashboard data as CSV. Add an export button to the toolbar that triggers a client-side download.

Constraints: Client-side generation (no server endpoint), use existing filter state, max 10k rows.
Scope: src/components/Dashboard/ExportButton.tsx (new), src/lib/csv.ts (new)
